Index.title: Welcome to Scooty Do
Index.description: Premium Electric Scooters for the Urban Commuter

Hero.eyebrow: Modern electric mobility for ambitious city riders
Hero.title: Move smarter.
Hero.description: Scooty DO delivers fast, foldable, stylish electric scooters designed for students, commuters, delivery riders, and anyone who wants a premium city ride without fuel costs.

Products.title: Choose the scooter that fits you
Products.description: From lightweight daily commuters to powerful long-range models — every scooter is built for performance and comfort on city streets.

ExperienceHubs.title: Experience Centers
ExperienceHubs.subtitle: Visit our physical flagship hubs to test drive, consult with experts, or pick up your premium electric scooter.
ExperienceHubs.cairoDesc: In the heart of Heliopolis. Dynamic showroom, test drive track, and fully certified service workshop.
ExperienceHubs.alexDesc: Overlooking Stanley bridge. Experience center, accessories vault, and immediate delivery hub.

ContactFAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
ContactFAQ.subtitle: Got questions? We've got answers. Quick insights before you get in touch.
ContactFAQ.q1: Can I take a test drive before purchasing?
ContactFAQ.a1: Absolutely! We highly encourage test drives. Visit our Cairo or Alexandria Experience Centers to test drive any of our models on a dedicated safe track with a certified specialist.
ContactFAQ.q2: What is the battery and motor warranty policy?
ContactFAQ.a2: Every Scooty Do scooter comes with a 1-year comprehensive warranty covering the battery pack, smart BMS, high-efficiency motor, and primary frame structure. Extended warranty plans are available at checkout.
ContactFAQ.q3: How long does shipping take and what is the cost?
ContactFAQ.a3: We offer premium home delivery within 24 to 48 hours anywhere in Egypt. Self-pickup is also available instantly from our Cairo Flagship Hub or Alexandria Coastal Hub once your order is confirmed.
ContactFAQ.q4: Do you provide home maintenance services?
ContactFAQ.a4: Yes, we do! For minor servicing, tire replacements, or electronic tune-ups, you can schedule a home-service visit from one of our mobile service engineers, or drop by our showroom workshops anytime.

Footer.tagline: Smart city mobility — no fuel, no fuss

EnvironmentalImpact.description: By choosing electric mobility over gas-powered vehicles, our community of riders has made a measurable impact on urban air quality and noise pollution. We believe the fastest way through the city should also be the cleanest.
EnvironmentalImpact.stat4Desc: Zero oil changes, zero emissions, and silent operation.

LifestyleGallery.title: The City is Yours
LifestyleGallery.description: Skip the traffic, feel the breeze, and experience a better way to move through your day.
